query: query GetPatientsAndObservations($patientPage: Int, $patientLimit: Int, $obsPage: Int, $obsCount: Int) { patients(page: $patientPage, limit: $patientLimit) { items { id name { given family } gender birthDate active identifier { system value } } total page count } observations(page: $obsPage, count: $obsCount) { id status code { text } subject { reference } effectiveDateTime valueQuantity { value unit } valueString } }
